vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.verification: Stress analysis on spar attachment flanges

requirements.description: Ensure human access to equipment bay

verify.value: All required fields present and valid.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat transfer from motor pod to cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis to ensure safe temperature distribution.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at spar attachment points under extreme loads.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and reinforce attachment flanges if needed.

risk.desc: Insufficient cooling efficiency leading to motor pod overheating.
risk.mit: Optimize cooling inlet design and conduct CFD simulations.

risk.desc: Difficulty in accessing equipment bay for maintenance.
risk.mit: Increase size of equipment bay door and add additional access points.

risk.desc: Inadequate support structures during FDM printing may cause deformation.
risk.mit: Review support structure placement and adjust build orientation.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.path_description: Heat from motor pod transferred through pod structure to cooling inlet for dissipation.
Structural loads from wing spars transmitted through pod shell to equipment bay door.
Human access to equipment bay via hinged equipment bay door.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures - Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent
Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums
Hardware features match real catalog hardware sizes
Payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only with removable mission/sensor module
Battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal
Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure
Mass budget: 500g

cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.
Each physical feature must include args.at [x,y,z] and real dimensions.

verify.value: Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate.
Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to CFRP material.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex interfaces.
risk.mit: Enhance assembly instructions and training.

risk.desc: Limited access for maintenance in certain areas.
risk.mit: Design additional access points if necessary.

risk.desc: Potential interference between electrical harness and structural components.
risk.mit: Review harness routing and adjust as needed.

risk.desc: Risk of improper preload or torque application on fasteners.
risk.mit: Include detailed torque specifications and verification steps.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings

manufacturing_strategy.inspection_implications: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, CMM for dimensional accuracy
